rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Hudson Construction's whole business is
built around <Color=red>supporting<Color=white> our customers as
they <Color=red>assemble their dream homes<Color=white>.
Maybe you're thinking a little basic—like
a kitchen. Or a fully furnished room. Or
something more. We're here for you!
Maybe you want to add a nice space to
display some of your favorite pictures. Or
a place to care for your beloved horse.
But that's nothing compared to what's
really important—and what all of our
customers truly enjoy—which is...
<unk[3:0:8]>the opportunity to <Color=red>assemble<Color=white> all these
individual <Color=red>rooms<Color=white> on their own!

<unk[3:0:264]>You pick the rooms you want, and then
you can put them together the way you
always imagined!
<unk[3:0:1]>That's the real core of the service
we provide.

We even give a little <Color=red>commemorative gift<Color=white>
to celebrate starting down the path to
dream-home ownership!
You know, our whole family is in your debt
for all your help with Mattison.

If you're interested in a <Color=red>dream home<Color=white>,
I'll set you up with a <Color=red>discount<Color=white>! It's my way
of saying sarqso. You know...<unk[5:0]>thank you.
